WOMEN'S CLUB

Semi-Private Coaching
★★★★★ 5.0 on Google · 350+ reviews

First Aid & CPR Certified
Fully Insured
The Program

GET STRONG, CONFIDENT, AND BACK TO YOURSELF.

We help busy women who haven't trained in a long time get back in shape — and start feeling strong, confident and like themselves again.

You're juggling kids, work and a household with nothing left for you — and your body's starting to let you know about it. Women's Club is where women over 30 rebuild their fitness, confidence and strength with proper coaching, real accountability, and a crew of locals who actually have your back. No mirrors. No judgement. Just results.

Sessions
3 / WEEK
Pick any times that suit

STRONG LOOKS
GOOD ON YOU.

Women over 30 rebuilding strength, energy and confidence together — with proper coaching and a sisterhood of locals cheering every win.

Meet Your Coach

A WORD FROM COACH HANNAH.

The coach who'll be in your corner — on why Women's Club works, straight from the gym floor.

The Three Pillars

COACHING, ACCOUNTABILITY, SISTERHOOD.

Personal Coaching

Coached guidance tailored to your body, your hormones, your goals and your life. No cookie-cutter plans — just a coach who actually gives a damn about you.

Accountability

We keep you honest. Weekly check-ins, progress tracking, and a coach in your corner making sure you never quietly fall off the wagon.

Sisterhood & Community

Train alongside women who get it. The encouragement, the laughs, the support — this is what keeps you walking back through the door.

Is This You?

WOMEN'S CLUB IS FOR WOMEN WHO…

✓You're a woman over 30
✓You avoid mirrors and hate how your clothes fit right now
✓You're juggling work, kids and a household with nothing left for you
✓You're sick of feeling tired, soft, and stuck in the same cycle
✓You've tried the diets, the apps, the home workouts — none of it stuck
✓You're done being intimidated by big-box gyms full of grunting blokes
✓You're prepared to eat well — you just need a real plan
✓You want to feel strong, energetic and confident again
How It Works

THREE STEPS TO YOUR FIRST SESSION.

01

Get Started

Get in touch in 15 seconds. We sit down, learn your goals and history, and map out what's actually realistic for your life — no pressure, no hard sell.

02

Train With The Crew

Pick any 3 women's-only 45-minute sessions a week. Coach-led, small groups of like-minded women. Get strong, drop fat, have a laugh, leave better than you walked in.

03

Get Real Results

A weekly 1-on-1 check-in with your coach keeps you honest. Clothes fit again. Strength climbs. Energy comes back.

What's Included

EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO ACTUALLY CHANGE.

✓3 women's-only 45-minute sessions per week
✓Personal Trainer leading every single session
✓Flexible timetable — train around work and family
✓Recovery & lifestyle coaching (sleep, stress, mobility)
✓Weekly 1-on-1 check-in with your coach
✓Body composition tracking
✓Private members' chat — coach reachable any time
✓Capped at 250 members so you're never just a number

Walked in terrified after years away from any gym. The coaches and the girls made me feel at home from session one. Down 8kg and actually excited to train now.

Women's Club has been life-changing. No mirrors, no judgement, just proper coaching around my body and my schedule. Strongest and happiest I've felt in years.

The weekly check-ins keep me accountable like nothing else has. Two kids, full-time work, and I've finally stuck with something past the first month. Cannot recommend enough.

At 52 I assumed strength training wasn't for me. The coaches scaled everything to my body and now I deadlift more than I ever imagined. The community is the best part.

Tried every gym in Pine Rivers and this is the only one that stuck. They know my name, my goals and my injuries. It genuinely feels like a sisterhood, not a card-swipe gym.

★★★★★4 months ago

Postnatal and zero confidence when I started. Twelve months on my back pain is gone and I'm lifting heavier than before the babies. The coaches genuinely care about you.

See all reviews on Google Write a review
FAQs

COMMON QUESTIONS.

01I haven't trained in years — am I too unfit for this?

No. Women's Club is literally built for women who haven't trained in a long time. Every session is scaled by the coach on the spot. Most members started exactly where you are.

02How many sessions a week, and how long?

You get to pick any 3 sessions per week. Each one is 45 minutes — short enough to fit a busy schedule, long enough to actually move the needle.

03Are the sessions women only?

Yes. Every Women's Club session is women only. No mirrors, no posing, no intimidation — just women working hard and supporting each other.

04Do you provide nutrition or meal plans?

No — we don't do nutrition coaching, meal plans, or banned-food lists. We focus on what we do best: coach-led training and accountability. If you want nutrition support, we're happy to point you to a qualified dietitian.

05What about hormones, perimenopause, or recovery from kids?

Our coaches understand training around the realities of being a woman 30+ — perimenopause, postnatal recovery, hormonal shifts. We program around your body, not against it.

06What's the catch with the 250 members cap?

We deliberately keep our coaching capped at 250 members across our studios so quality stays high. Most members renew month after month, so spots open up rarely.

07How do I get started?

Get in touch (takes 15 seconds). We sit down, walk you through how it works, and you decide if it's the right fit. No pressure, no hard sell.

GET IN CONTACT

Ready to start your transformation? Fill out the form below and a coach will be in touch — no pressure, no contracts.

No pressure · No contracts · A coach will be in touch within 1 business day.
